name: acquisition caps at --max-rules and flags budget_exhausted rather than silently truncating
command: ID=P556Q04; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/acquire-technology-rules.sh" --technology Vue --project $ID --source-file g.txt --source-id sid --max-rules 2 --now 2026-07-05T00:00:00Z 2>e.err; rm -rf "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards"/_project/$ID; grep -qE 'acquired=2 .*budget_exhausted=true' e.err && echo acquire-budget-capped 1>&2
setup: printf '%s\n' a b c d e f > g.txt
